# A1 Diagnosis

> A1 Diagnosis is a US-based medical diagnostics startup developing the world's first blood-based risk assessment test for age-related macular degeneration (AMD).

A1 Diagnosis uses machine learning and mass spectrometry to analyze blood biomarkers, enabling detection of AMD risk years before vision loss occurs. The platform achieved 94-95% proof-of-concept accuracy using a Gradient Boosting Classifier with 5-fold cross-validation.

## Company Details

- **Founded:** 2024
- **Location:** Orange County, California, USA
- **Website:** https://a1diagnosis.com
- **Contact:** ozgul@A1Diagnosis.com | (949) 381-1966
- **Stage:** Pre-clinical validation, targeting CLIA laboratory launch Q1 2027
- **Price:** $250 per test
- **Regulatory Pathway:** CLIA-certified Laboratory Developed Test (LDT)

## Founders

- **Dr. Mustafa Ozgul, MD** — CEO & Co-Founder. 6 years of AMD research at UC Irvine Gavin Herbert Eye Institute. 24 peer-reviewed publications. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/drozgul
- **Dr. Murat Baday, PhD** — Co-Founder. Stanford researcher and Synapses Ventures founder. Led Smartlens to $6.1M Series A in July 2023. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/muratbaday

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://a1diagnosis.com/): Overview of A1 Diagnosis and the proactive vision risk analysis platform
- [What is AMD?](https://a1diagnosis.com/what-is-amd.html): Education on age-related macular degeneration
- [How It Works](https://a1diagnosis.com/how-it-works.html): Blood-based AMD risk detection technology explained
- [Proactive Vision Platform](https://a1diagnosis.com/proactive-vision-platform.html): Details on the blood-based AMD risk assessment platform
- [Publications](https://a1diagnosis.com/publications.html): Peer-reviewed research from the founding team
- [Validation Study](https://a1diagnosis.com/validation-study.html): 240-sample cross-sectional study design
- [Pipeline](https://a1diagnosis.com/pipeline.html): Multi-disease expansion roadmap beyond AMD
- [FAQs](https://a1diagnosis.com/faqs.html): Frequently asked questions about AMD and the test
- [Early Risk Assessment](https://a1diagnosis.com/early-risk-assessment.html): Why early detection of AMD matters
- [AMD Stages](https://a1diagnosis.com/amd-stages.html): Stages and progression of macular degeneration
- [Risk Factors](https://a1diagnosis.com/risk-factors.html): Known risk factors for AMD
- [Treatment Landscape](https://a1diagnosis.com/treatment-landscape.html): Current AMD treatment options
- [Investor Contact](https://a1diagnosis.com/investor-contact.html): Investment inquiries

## Market

- Total Addressable Market: $42.3 billion
- US target population (age 35+): 169 million
- AMD affects approximately 196 million people globally

## Technology

- Blood-based biomarker analysis using mass spectrometry
- Machine learning algorithms analyzing 10,000+ molecules
- Gradient Boosting Classifier with 95.45% cross-validation accuracy
- Non-invasive alternative to current imaging-based AMD screening
